en: Concerning Moab.Thus says the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel: "Woe to Nebo, for it is laid waste! Kiriathaim is put to shame, it is taken; the fortress is put to shame and broken down;
zh: 論到摩押， 萬軍之耶和華以色列的 神這樣說： “尼波有禍了！因為它變為荒涼； 基列亭蒙受羞辱，被佔領了； 這城堡 蒙受羞辱，被毀壞。

en: the renown of Moab is no more. In Heshbon they planned disaster against her: 'Come, let us cut her off from being a nation!' You also, O Madmen, shall be brought to silence; the sword shall pursue you.
zh: 摩押不再被人稱讚； 敵人在希實本計謀害它，說： ‘來吧！我們要把它剪除， 使它不再成國！’ 瑪得緬哪！你也要靜默無聲； 刀劍必追趕你。

en: "Hark! A cry from Horonaim, 'Desolation and great destruction!'
zh: 從何羅念傳出哀號的聲音，說： ‘荒涼了，大大毀滅了！’

en: Moab is destroyed; her little ones have made a cry.
zh: 摩押毀滅了， 它的孩童發出哀叫 。

en: For at the ascent of Luhith they go up weeping; for at the descent of Horonaim they have heard the distressed cry of destruction.
zh: 在上魯希的路上， 摩押人隨走隨哭； 從何羅念下來的途中， 聽見他們因城被毀發出悽慘的哀號聲。”

en: Flee! Save yourselves! You will be like a juniper in the desert!
zh: 你們要逃跑，趕快逃命吧！ 你們好像曠野的灌木。

en: For, because you trusted in your works and your treasures, you also shall be taken; and Chemosh shall go into exile with his priests and his officials.
zh: 你因為倚靠你的成就和財富， 就必被攻取； 基抹必被擄去， 事奉它的祭司和領袖都必一同被擄去。

en: The destroyer shall come upon every city, and no city shall escape; the valley shall perish, and the plain shall be destroyed, as the LORD has spoken.
zh: 行毀滅的必來攻擊一切城鎮， 沒有一座城可以倖免； 山谷必被蹂躪， 平原必受破壞， 正如耶和華所說的。

en: "Give wings to Moab, for she would fly away; her cities shall become a desolation, with no inhabitant in them.
zh: 你們要在摩押上面撒鹽， 因為它必成為廢墟 ； 它的城鎮必成為荒涼， 沒有人在裡面居住。

en: "Cursed is he who does the work of the LORD with slackness, and cursed is he who keeps back his sword from bloodshed.
zh: 不努力去作耶和華的工作的，該受咒詛； 不使自己的刀劍見血的，應受咒詛。

en: "Moab has been at ease from his youth and has settled on his dregs; he has not been emptied from vessel to vessel, nor has he gone into exile; so his taste remains in him, and his scent is not changed.
zh: 摩押自年幼以來常享安逸， 像不受攪擾的酒在缸裡澄清， 從沒有倒進另一個缸裡去， 它也從沒有被人擄去。 因此它仍保留著原味， 它的芬芳沒有改變失去。

en: "Therefore, behold, the days are coming, declares the LORD, when I shall send to him pourers who will pour him, and empty his vessels and break his jars in pieces.
zh: “看哪！日子快到 ，我必差派倒酒的人到它那裡去，把它倒出來，直至倒空，又把酒缸打碎。

en: Then Moab shall be ashamed of Chemosh, as the house of Israel was ashamed of Bethel, their confidence.
zh: 摩押必因基抹羞愧，好像以色列家因他們可倚靠的伯特利的神像羞愧一樣。

en: "How do you say, 'We are heroes and mighty men of war'?
zh: 你們怎麼說：‘我們是勇士， 是善戰的武士’？

en: The destroyer of Moab and his cities has come up, and the choicest of his young men have gone down to slaughter, declares the King, whose name is the LORD of hosts.
zh: 摩押被毀滅；敵人上來攻擊它的城鎮； 摩押最精銳的少年下去被屠殺。” 這是君王的宣告，他的名是萬軍之耶和華。

en: The calamity of Moab is near at hand, and his affliction hastens swiftly.
zh: “摩押的災難已經臨近了， 它的禍患迅速來到。

en: Grieve for him, all you who are around him, and all who know his name; say, 'How the mighty scepter is broken, the glorious staff.'
zh: 所有在它四圍的， 所有認識它名的， 你們都要為它哀悼，說： ‘那有能力的權杖、 華美的杖竟然折斷了！’

en: "Come down from your glory, and sit on the parched ground, O inhabitant of Dibon! For the destroyer of Moab has come up against you; he has destroyed your strongholds.
zh: 住在底本的人民哪！ 要從你們榮耀的位上下來， 坐在乾旱的地上 ， 因為毀滅摩押的要上來攻擊你們， 摧毀你們的堅固城。

en: Stand by the way and watch, O inhabitant of Aroer! Ask him who flees and her who escapes; say, 'What has happened?'
zh: 亞羅珥的居民哪！ 要站在路旁觀望， 詢問那些正在逃跑的男女，說： ‘發生了甚麼事？’

en: Moab is put to shame, for it is broken; wail and cry! Tell it beside the Arnon, that Moab is laid waste.
zh: 摩押蒙受羞辱，因為它已被毀滅了。 你們要哀號喊叫， 要在亞嫩河宣告： ‘摩押毀滅了。’

en: "Judgment has come upon the tableland, upon Holon, and Jahzah, and Mephaath,
zh: 審判臨到了平原之地，就是何倫、雅雜、米法押、

en: and Dibon, and Nebo, and Beth-diblathaim,
zh: 底本、尼波、伯．低比拉太音、

en: and Kiriathaim, and Beth-gamul, and Beth-meon,
zh: 基列亭、伯．迦末、伯．米恩、

en: and Kerioth, and Bozrah, and all the cities of the land of Moab, far and near.
zh: 加略、波斯拉和摩押地遠近所有城市。

en: The horn of Moab is cut off, and his arm is broken, declares the LORD.
zh: 摩押的角被砍下，它的膀臂被折斷了。”這是耶和華的宣告。

en: "Make him drunk, because he magnified himself against the LORD, so that Moab shall wallow in his vomit, and he too shall be held in derision.
zh: 你們要使摩押沉醉，因為它向耶和華妄自尊大；摩押必跌在自己所吐之物上面，也必成為被人譏笑的對象。

en: Was not Israel a derision to you? Was he found among thieves, that whenever you spoke of him you wagged your head?
zh: 摩押啊，以色列不是曾經成為你譏笑的對象嗎？它豈是被捕獲的強盜，以致你每逢提到它，總是搖頭嘲笑。

en: "Leave the cities, and dwell in the rock, O inhabitants of Moab! Be like the dove that nests in the sides of the mouth of a gorge.
zh: 摩押的居民哪！ 你們要離棄城鎮，住在山巖裡， 像鴿子在峽谷的邊上築巢。

en: We have heard of the pride of Moab- he is very proud- of his loftiness, his pride, and his arrogance, and the haughtiness of his heart.
zh: 我們聽說摩押的驕傲， 它非常驕傲； 我們聽到它的狂妄、驕傲、傲慢和心裡的自高。

en: I know his insolence, declares the LORD; his boasts are false, his deeds are false.
zh: “我洞悉它的狂傲 ， 它的狂傲毫無根據， 它的誇耀不能成事。

en: Therefore I wail for Moab; I cry out for all Moab; for the men of Kir-hareseth I mourn.
zh: 因此我要為摩押哀號， 為全摩押喊叫， 為吉珥．哈列設人 唉哼。

en: More than for Jazer I weep for you, O vine of Sibmah! Your branches passed over the sea, reached to the Sea of Jazer; on your summer fruits and your grapes the destroyer has fallen.
zh: 西比瑪的葡萄樹啊！ 我要你哀哭比人為雅謝哀哭更厲害。 你的枝子伸展過海， 延伸到雅謝 ； 那行毀滅的要來摧毀你夏天的果子和你的葡萄。

en: Gladness and joy have been taken away from the fruitful land of Moab; I have made the wine cease from the wine presses; no one treads them with shouts of joy; the shouting is not the shout of joy.
zh: 摩押肥沃的土地上不再有歡喜和快樂； 我使榨酒池不再流出酒； 再沒有人歡呼踹酒； 有人呼喊，卻不是踹酒的歡呼聲。

en: "From the outcry at Heshbon even to Elealeh, as far as Jahaz they utter their voice, from Zoar to Horonaim and Eglath-shelishiyah. For the waters of Nimrim also have become desolate.
zh: “希實本的哀叫傳到以利亞利，他們發出的聲音傳到雅雜，從瑣珥達到何羅念和伊基拉．施利施亞；因為連寧林的河水也都乾涸了。

en: And I will bring to an end in Moab, declares the LORD, him who offers sacrifice in the high place and makes offerings to his god.
zh: 我要滅絕在摩押那些邱壇上獻祭和向他們的神燒香的。”這是耶和華的宣告。

en: Therefore my heart moans for Moab like a flute, and my heart moans like a flute for the men of Kir-hareseth. Therefore the riches they gained have perished.
zh: “因此，我的心為摩押嗚咽，好像人用笛吹輓歌；我的心為吉珥．哈列設人嗚咽，好像人用笛吹輓歌；因為他們所得的財寶都失掉了。

en: "For every head is shaved and every beard cut off. On all the hands are gashes, and around the waist is sackcloth.
zh: 他們各人的頭都剃光了，鬍鬚也剃掉了，他們割傷了自己的手，腰束麻布。

en: On all the housetops of Moab and in the squares there is nothing but lamentation, for I have broken Moab like a vessel for which no one cares, declares the LORD.
zh: 摩押境內一切房頂上和廣場上，處處都有哀哭的聲音；因為我擊碎了摩押，好像打碎沒有人要的器皿。”這是耶和華的宣告。

en: How it is broken! How they wail! How Moab has turned his back in shame! So Moab has become a derision and a horror to all that are around him."
zh: 摩押的毀滅多麼厲害，他們的哀號多麼悽慘！摩押怎樣蒙羞轉背！這樣摩押就成了它四圍眾人譏笑和驚駭的對象。”

en: For thus says the LORD: "Behold, one shall fly swiftly like an eagle and spread his wings against Moab;
zh: 因為耶和華這樣說： “看哪！必有一人像大鷹疾飛， 展開翅膀攻擊摩押。

en: the cities shall be taken and the strongholds seized. The heart of the warriors of Moab shall be in that day like the heart of a woman in her birth pains;
zh: 城市被攻取， 堅壘被佔領； 在那日，摩押勇士的心必驚慌， 像臨產婦人的心一樣。

en: Moab shall be destroyed and be no longer a people, because he magnified himself against the LORD.
zh: 摩押必被摧毀，不再成為一個民族， 因為它向耶和華妄自尊大。

en: Terror, pit, and snare are before you, O inhabitant of Moab! declares the LORD.
zh: 摩押的居民哪！ 恐懼、陷阱、圈套都落在你們身上了。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: He who flees from the terror shall fall into the pit, and he who climbs out of the pit shall be caught in the snare. For I will bring these things upon Moab, the year of their punishment, declares the LORD.
zh: “那逃避恐懼的，必跌進陷阱； 那從陷阱中出來的，必被圈套困著。 因為我必使摩押受懲罰的年日臨到它。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: "In the shadow of Heshbon fugitives stop without strength, for fire came out from Heshbon, flame from the house of Sihon; it has destroyed the forehead of Moab, the crown of the sons of tumult.
zh: “在希實本的隱蔽處， 難民精疲力盡地站著； 因為有火從希實本發出， 有火燄從西宏的宮中冒出來， 吞滅了摩押的前額， 和吵鬧的人的頭頂。

en: Woe to you, O Moab! The people of Chemosh are undone, for your sons have been taken captive, and your daughters into captivity.
zh: 摩押啊，你有禍了！ 基抹的人民滅亡了！ 因為你的眾子都被擄去了， 你的眾女兒也都被擄去了。

en: Yet I will restore the fortunes of Moab in the latter days, declares the LORD." Thus far is the judgment on Moab.
zh: 但日後，我必使被擄的摩押人歸回。” 這是耶和華的宣告。 有關摩押的宣判到這裡為止。
